MINI MINUTES FOR OCT-30-24 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 525

DISCOVERY, DEPT. 525, AS TO THE OCT-30-2024 HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS CHESTNUT PARTNERS, LLC, AND JULIE WINTER'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFFS FURTHER DEPOSITION AND REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS; THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. THE MOTION IS GRANTED IN PART. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO ATTEND THE FINAL SESSION OF HER CONTINUED DEPOSITION ON A DATE PRIOR TO NOVEMBER 4, 2024. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED AGAINST PLAINTIFF AND HER COUNSEL IN THE REDUCED AMOUNT OF $1,470, TO BE PAID TO DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL WITHIN FOURTEEN (14) CALENDAR DAYS. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312, AND EMAIL TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM. JUDGE PRO TEM: JOHN-PAUL DEOL; CLERK: V. DA FONSECA; NOT REPORTED. (525/JPT)

Notice Of Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Further Deposition And Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-30-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANTS CHESTNUT PARTNERS, LLC, AND JULIE WINTER's Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Further Deposition And Request For Monetary Sanctions.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The motion is granted in part. Plaintiff is ordered to attend the final session of her continued deposition on a date prior to November 4, 2024. Sanctions are awarded against Plaintiff and her counsel in the reduced amount of $1,470, to be paid to Defendant's counsel within fourteen (14) calendar days.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling, with a cover letter stating compliance with CRC 3.1312, and email to the Judge Pro Tem.

Judge Pro Tem: John-Paul Deol; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (525/JPT)
